prerequisite_alternative: scorecard CLI requires GitHub auth (GITHUB_TOKEN) plus a public repository URL signal to produce a meaningful score. Phase 5 best-effort attempt did not install the CLI in the local environment to avoid altering the toolchain just to satisfy a metric. Maintainer can run scorecard against the public repository manually using the workflow from https://github.com/ossf/scorecard/blob/main/docs/checks.md and commit the resulting JSON to this path.
notes: This file documents the absence of an OpenSSF Scorecard score rather than fabricating one. See docs/archive/HISTORY.md for the consolidated Phase 5 hardening record. The fallback signals above use the locally-measurable security indicators.
